questions.prompt: If \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \), find all other trigonometric ratios.
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) है, तो अन्य सभी त्रिकोणमितीय-अनुपात ज्ञात करें।
questions.reason: Given \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \). We know \( \sin\theta = \frac{\text{Perpendicular (P)}}{\text{Hypotenuse (H)}} \). So \( P = 4, H = 5 \). By Pythagoras theorem, \( \text{Base (B)} = \sqrt{H^2 - P^2} = \sqrt{25 - 16} = \sqrt{9} = 3 \). Therefore: \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} = \frac{3}{5} \), \( \tan\theta = \frac{P}{B} = \frac{4}{3} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{B}{P} = \frac{3}{4} \), \( \sec\theta = \frac{H}{B} = \frac{5}{3} \), \( \csc\theta = \frac{H}{P} = \frac{5}{4} \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \)। हम जानते हैं कि \( \sin\theta = \frac{\text{लंब (P)}}{\text{कर्ण (H)}} \)। इसलिए \( P = 4, H = 5 \)। पाइथागोरस प्रमेय के अनुसार, \( \text{आधार (B)} = \sqrt{H^2 - P^2} = \sqrt{25 - 16} = \sqrt{9} = 3 \)। अतः: \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} = \frac{3}{5} \), \( \tan\theta = \frac{P}{B} = \frac{4}{3} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{B}{P} = \frac{3}{4} \), \( \sec\theta = \frac{H}{B} = \frac{5}{3} \), \( \csc\theta = \frac{H}{P} = \frac{5}{4} \) होगा।

questions.reason:
Given \( \cos\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) (B/H). So \( B = 4, H = 5 \). Perpendicular \( P = \sqrt{5^2 - 4^2} = 3 \).
Then \( \sin\theta = \frac{3}{5} \), \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \).
Numerator = \( \sin\theta + \cos\theta = \frac{3}{5} + \frac{4}{5} = \frac{7}{5} \).
Denominator = \( \tan\theta + \cot\theta = \frac{3}{4} + \frac{4}{3} = \frac{9+16}{12} = \frac{25}{12} \).
Result = \( \frac{\frac{7}{5}}{\frac{25}{12}} = \frac{7}{5} \times \frac{12}{25} = \frac{84}{125} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( \cos\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) (आधार/कर्ण)। अतः आधार \( B = 4 \), कर्ण \( H = 5 \)। लंब \( P = \sqrt{5^2 - 4^2} = 3 \)।
तब \( \sin\theta = \frac{3}{5} \), \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \)।
अंश = \( \sin\theta + \cos\theta = \frac{3}{5} + \frac{4}{5} = \frac{7}{5} \)।
हर = \( \tan\theta + \cot\theta = \frac{3}{4} + \frac{4}{3} = \frac{9+16}{12} = \frac{25}{12} \)।
परिणाम = \( \frac{\frac{7}{5}}{\frac{25}{12}} = \frac{7}{5} \times \frac{12}{25} = \frac{84}{125} \)।

questions.reason:
Given \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) (P/B). So \( P = 3, B = 4 \). Hypotenuse \( H = \sqrt{3^2 + 4^2} = 5 \).
Thus, \( \sin\theta = \frac{3}{5} \) and \( \cos\theta = \frac{4}{5} \).
Numerator = \( 1 + 2\left(\frac{3}{5}\right) + 3\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) = 1 + \frac{6}{5} + \frac{12}{5} = 1 + \frac{18}{5} = \frac{23}{5} \).
Denominator = \( 2 + 3\left(\frac{3}{5}\right) - 2\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) = 2 + \frac{9}{5} - \frac{8}{5} = 2 + \frac{1}{5} = \frac{11}{5} \).
Result = \( \frac{\frac{23}{5}}{\frac{11}{5}} = \frac{23}{11} \).

questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \) है, तो \( \frac{a\sin\theta - b\cos\theta}{a\sin\theta + b\cos\theta} \) ज्ञात करें।
questions.reason: Divide the numerator and denominator by \( \cos\theta \) to get \( \frac{a\tan\theta - b}{a\tan\theta + b} \). Substitute \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \) to get \( \frac{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) - b}{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) + b} = \frac{\frac{a^2}{b} - b}{\frac{a^2}{b} + b} = \frac{a^2 - b^2}{a^2 + b^2} \).
questions.reason_hi: अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर \( \frac{a\tan\theta - b}{a\tan\theta + b} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \) रखने पर \( \frac{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) - b}{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) + b} = \frac{\frac{a^2}{b} - b}{\frac{a^2}{b} + b} = \frac{a^2 - b^2}{a^2 + b^2} \) प्राप्त होगा।

questions.reason: Given \( 3\tan\theta = 4 \), so \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \). Dividing the numerator and denominator by \( \cos\theta \), we get \( \frac{4 - \tan\theta}{2 + \tan\theta} \). Substituting \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \), we get \( \frac{4 - \frac{4}{3}}{2 + \frac{4}{3}} = \frac{\frac{8}{3}}{\frac{10}{3}} = \frac{8}{10} = \frac{4}{5} \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( 3\tan\theta = 4 \), अतः \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \)। अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर, हमें \( \frac{4 - \tan\theta}{2 + \tan\theta} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \) रखने पर, \( \frac{4 - \frac{4}{3}}{2 + \frac{4}{3}} = \frac{\frac{8}{3}}{\frac{10}{3}} = \frac{8}{10} = \frac{4}{5} \) प्राप्त होगा।

questions.reason: Given \( 3\cot\theta = 2 \), so \( \cot\theta = \frac{2}{3} \). Dividing the numerator and denominator by \( \sin\theta \), we get \( \frac{4 - 3\cot\theta}{2 + 6\cot\theta} \). Substituting \( \cot\theta = \frac{2}{3} \), we get \( \frac{4 - 3\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)}{2 + 6\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)} = \frac{4 - 2}{2 + 4} = \frac{2}{6} = \frac{1}{3} \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( 3\cot\theta = 2 \), अतः \( \cot\theta = \frac{2}{3} \)। अंश और हर को \( \sin\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर, हमें \( \frac{4 - 3\cot\theta}{2 + 6\cot\theta} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \cot\theta = \frac{2}{3} \) रखने पर, \( \frac{4 - 3\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)}{2 + 6\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)} = \frac{4 - 2}{2 + 4} = \frac{2}{6} = \frac{1}{3} \) प्राप्त होगा।

questions.reason: Given \( 5\tan\theta - 4 = 0 \), so \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{5} \). Dividing the numerator and denominator by \( \cos\theta \) gives \( \frac{5\tan\theta - 3}{5\tan\theta + 2} \). Substituting \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{5} \), we get \( \frac{5\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) - 3}{5\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) + 2} = \frac{4 - 3}{4 + 2} = \frac{1}{6} \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( 5\tan\theta - 4 = 0 \), अतः \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{5} \)। अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर \( \frac{5\tan\theta - 3}{5\tan\theta + 2} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) रखने पर, \( \frac{5\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) - 3}{5\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) + 2} = \frac{4 - 3}{4 + 2} = \frac{1}{6} \) प्राप्त होगा।

questions.prompt: If \( 3\cot\theta = 4 \), then find the value of \( \frac{5\sin\theta + 3\cos\theta}{5\sin\theta - 3\cos\theta} \).
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( 3\cot\theta = 4 \) हो, तो \( \frac{5\sin\theta + 3\cos\theta}{5\sin\theta - 3\cos\theta} \) का मान है-
questions.reason: Given \( 3\cot\theta = 4 \), meaning \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \). Dividing the numerator and denominator by \( \sin\theta \) gives \( \frac{5 + 3\cot\theta}{5 - 3\cot\theta} \). Substituting \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \), we get \( \frac{5 + 3\left(\frac{4}{3}\right)}{5 - 3\left(\frac{4}{3}\right)} = \frac{5 + 4}{5 - 4} = \frac{9}{1} = 9 \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( 3\cot\theta = 4 \), जिसका अर्थ है \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \)। अंश और हर को \( \sin\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर \( \frac{5 + 3\cot\theta}{5 - 3\cot\theta} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \) रखने पर, हमें \( \frac{5 + 3\left(\frac{4}{3}\right)}{5 - 3\left(\frac{4}{3}\right)} = \frac{5 + 4}{5 - 4} = \frac{9}{1} = 9 \) प्राप्त होता है।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \), then find the value of \( \frac{a\sin\theta + b\cos\theta}{a\sin\theta - b\cos\theta} \).
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \) हो, तो \( \frac{a\sin\theta + b\cos\theta}{a\sin\theta - b\cos\theta} \) कितना होगा-
questions.reason: Divide the numerator and denominator by \( \cos\theta \) to obtain \( \frac{a\tan\theta + b}{a\tan\theta - b} \). Since \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \), this becomes \( \frac{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) + b}{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) - b} = \frac{\frac{a^2}{b} + b}{\frac{a^2}{b} - b} \). Multiplying by \( b \) simplifies this to \( \frac{a^2 + b^2}{a^2 - b^2} \).
questions.reason_hi: अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर \( \frac{a\tan\theta + b}{a\tan\theta - b} \) प्राप्त होता है। चूँकि \( \tan\theta = \frac{a}{b} \) है, इसलिए यह \( \frac{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) + b}{a\left(\frac{a}{b}\right) - b} = \frac{\frac{a^2}{b} + b}{\frac{a^2}{b} - b} \) हो जाता है। \( b \) से गुणा करके सरल करने पर \( \frac{a^2 + b^2}{a^2 - b^2} \) प्राप्त होता है।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan\theta = 1 \), then find the value of \( \frac{\sin\theta + 2\cos\theta}{\sin\theta + 3\cos\theta} \).
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan\theta = 1 \) हो तो \( \frac{\sin\theta + 2\cos\theta}{\sin\theta + 3\cos\theta} \) का मान होगा-
questions.reason: Divide the numerator and denominator by \( \cos\theta \) to get \( \frac{\tan\theta + 2}{\tan\theta + 3} \). Substituting \( \tan\theta = 1 \) gives \( \frac{1 + 2}{1 + 3} = \frac{3}{4} \).
questions.reason_hi: अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करने पर \( \frac{\tan\theta + 2}{\tan\theta + 3} \) प्राप्त होता है। \( \tan\theta = 1 \) रखने पर \( \frac{1 + 2}{1 + 3} = \frac{3}{4} \) प्राप्त होगा।

questions.prompt: If \( \cos\theta = \frac{3}{5} \), then find the value of \( \frac{\sin\theta - \cot\theta}{2\tan\theta} = ? \)
questions.reason:
Since \( \cos\theta = \frac{3}{5} \) (Base/Hypotenuse), Perpendicular \( P = 4 \). Then, \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{3}{4} \), and \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \).
Numerator: \( \sin\theta - \cot\theta = \frac{4}{5} - \frac{3}{4} = \frac{16 - 15}{20} = \frac{1}{20} \).
Denominator: \( 2\tan\theta = 2\left(\frac{4}{3}\right) = \frac{8}{3} \).
Result: \( \frac{\frac{1}{20}}{\frac{8}{3}} = \frac{1}{20} \times \frac{3}{8} = \frac{3}{160} \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \cos\theta = \frac{3}{5} \) (आधार/कर्ण), लंब \( P = 4 \) होगा। अतः, \( \sin\theta = \frac{4}{5} \), \( \cot\theta = \frac{3}{4} \), और \( \tan\theta = \frac{4}{3} \)।
अंश: \( \sin\theta - \cot\theta = \frac{4}{5} - \frac{3}{4} = \frac{16 - 15}{20} = \frac{1}{20} \)।
हर: \( 2\tan\theta = 2\left(\frac{4}{3}\right) = \frac{8}{3} \)।
परिणाम: \( \frac{\frac{1}{20}}{\frac{8}{3}} = \frac{1}{20} \times \frac{3}{8} = \frac{3}{160} \)।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \), then find the value of \( \frac{1 - \cos\theta}{1 + \cos\theta} \).
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) हो, तो \( \frac{1 - \cos\theta}{1 + \cos\theta} \) का मान ज्ञात करो।
questions.reason:
Given \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) (P/B), meaning Hypotenuse \( H = 5 \). So, \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} = \frac{4}{5} \).
Expression: \( \frac{1 - \frac{4}{5}}{1 + \frac{4}{5}} = \frac{\frac{1}{5}}{\frac{9}{5}} = \frac{1}{9} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) (लंब/आधार), जिसका अर्थ है कर्ण \( H = 5 \)। अतः, \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} = \frac{4}{5} \)।
व्यंजक: \( \frac{1 - \frac{4}{5}}{1 + \frac{4}{5}} = \frac{\frac{1}{5}}{\frac{9}{5}} = \frac{1}{9} \)।

questions.prompt: If \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \), then find the value of \( \frac{1 - \cos^2\theta}{2 - \sin^2\theta} \).
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \) हो, तो \( \frac{1 - \cos^2\theta}{2 - \sin^2\theta} \) का मान ज्ञात करें-
questions.reason:
Since \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \), the angle \( \theta = 60^\circ \). Therefore, \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) and \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \).
Substitute these into the expression: \( \frac{1 - (\frac{1}{2})^2}{2 - (\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2})^2} = \frac{1 - \frac{1}{4}}{2 - \frac{3}{4}} = \frac{\frac{3}{4}}{\frac{5}{4}} = \frac{3}{5} \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \) है, कोण \( \theta = 60^\circ \) होगा। इसलिए, \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) और \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \)।
व्यंजक में मान रखने पर: \( \frac{1 - (\frac{1}{2})^2}{2 - (\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2})^2} = \frac{1 - \frac{1}{4}}{2 - \frac{3}{4}} = \frac{\frac{3}{4}}{\frac{5}{4}} = \frac{3}{5} \) प्राप्त होता है।

questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( 8\tan x = 15 \) हो, तो \( \sin x - \cos x = ? \)
questions.reason:
We have \( \tan x = \frac{15}{8} \) (Perpendicular/Base). By Pythagoras, Hypotenuse \( H = \sqrt{15^2 + 8^2} = 17 \). Thus, \( \sin x = \frac{15}{17} \) and \( \cos x = \frac{8}{17} \).
\( \sin x - \cos x = \frac{15}{17} - \frac{8}{17} = \frac{7}{17} \).

Given \( \cos\theta = \frac{1}{3} \) (Base/Hypotenuse). So, \( B=1 \) and \( H=3 \). Perpendicular \( P = \sqrt{3^2 - 1^2} = \sqrt{8} = 2\sqrt{2} \).
\( \sin\theta = \frac{P}{H} = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3} \). \( \tan\theta = \frac{P}{B} = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{1} = 2\sqrt{2} \).
Expression: \( \sin\theta + \tan\theta = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3} + 2\sqrt{2} = \frac{2\sqrt{2} + 6\sqrt{2}}{3} = \frac{8\sqrt{2}}{3} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( \cos\theta = \frac{1}{3} \) (आधार/कर्ण)। अतः, \( B=1 \) और \( H=3 \)। लंब \( P = \sqrt{3^2 - 1^2} = \sqrt{8} = 2\sqrt{2} \)।
\( \sin\theta = \frac{P}{H} = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3} \)। \( \tan\theta = \frac{P}{B} = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{1} = 2\sqrt{2} \)।
व्यंजक: \( \sin\theta + \tan\theta = \frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3} + 2\sqrt{2} = \frac{2\sqrt{2} + 6\sqrt{2}}{3} = \frac{8\sqrt{2}}{3} \)।

questions.reason:
\( \sin\theta = 0.6 = \frac{6}{10} = \frac{3}{5} \). This means \( P=3, H=5 \), and by Pythagorean triplet \( B=4 \).
\( \tan\theta = \frac{P}{B} = \frac{3}{4} = 0.75 \). \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} = \frac{4}{5} = 0.8 \).
Sum = \( 0.75 + 0.80 = 1.55 \).

Using the trigonometric identity \( \sin^2\theta + \cos^2\theta = 1 \), we find \( \cos\theta = \sqrt{1 - \sin^2\theta} \).
\( \cos\theta = \sqrt{1 - 0.7^2} = \sqrt{1 - 0.49} = \sqrt{0.51} \).
questions.reason_hi:
त्रिकोणमितीय सर्वसमिका \( \sin^2\theta + \cos^2\theta = 1 \) का उपयोग करते हुए, हम \( \cos\theta = \sqrt{1 - \sin^2\theta} \) प्राप्त करते हैं।
\( \cos\theta = \sqrt{1 - 0.7^2} = \sqrt{1 - 0.49} = \sqrt{0.51} \)।

questions.reason:
Given \( \tan\theta = \frac{x}{y} \), which represents \( \frac{\text{Perpendicular}}{\text{Base}} \). The Hypotenuse is \( \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \).
\( \cos\theta \) is \( \frac{\text{Base}}{\text{Hypotenuse}} \), which equals \( \frac{y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( \tan\theta = \frac{x}{y} \), जो \( \frac{\text{लंब}}{\text{आधार}} \) को दर्शाता है। कर्ण \( \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \) होगा।
\( \cos\theta \) \( \frac{\text{आधार}}{\text{कर्ण}} \) होता है, जो \( \frac{y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} \) के बराबर है।

questions.reason:
Simplify the expression: \( \sec\alpha + \left(\frac{\sin^3\alpha}{\cos^3\alpha}\right) \times \left(\frac{1}{\sin\alpha}\right) = \sec\alpha + \frac{\sin^2\alpha}{\cos^3\alpha} = \sec\alpha + \left(\frac{1}{\cos\alpha}\right) \times \left(\frac{\sin^2\alpha}{\cos^2\alpha}\right) = \sec\alpha + \sec\alpha \times \tan^2\alpha = \sec\alpha (1 + \tan^2\alpha) = \sec\alpha (\sec^2\alpha) = \sec^3\alpha \).
Since \( \tan\alpha = p \), \( \sec\alpha = \sqrt{1 + p^2} \). Therefore, \( \sec^3\alpha = ((1+p^2)^{\frac{1}{2}})^3 = (1 + p^2)^{\frac{3}{2}} \).
questions.reason_hi:
व्यंजक को सरल करें: \( \sec\alpha + \left(\frac{\sin^3\alpha}{\cos^3\alpha}\right) \times \left(\frac{1}{\sin\alpha}\right) = \sec\alpha + \frac{\sin^2\alpha}{\cos^3\alpha} = \sec\alpha + \left(\frac{1}{\cos\alpha}\right) \times \left(\frac{\sin^2\alpha}{\cos^2\alpha}\right) = \sec\alpha + \sec\alpha \times \tan^2\alpha = \sec\alpha (1 + \tan^2\alpha) = \sec\alpha (\sec^2\alpha) = \sec^3\alpha \)।
चूँकि \( \tan\alpha = p \) है, \( \sec\alpha = \sqrt{1 + p^2} \) होगा। अतः, \( \sec^3\alpha = ((1+p^2)^{\frac{1}{2}})^3 = (1 + p^2)^{\frac{3}{2}} \) होगा।

questions.prompt: If \( \tan^2\theta = 1 - e^2 \), then what will be the value of \( \sec\theta + \tan^3\theta \csc\theta \)?
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \tan^2\theta = 1 - e^2 \), तो \( \sec\theta + \tan^3\theta \csc\theta \) का मान क्या होगा?
questions.reason:
As shown in the previous question, \( \sec\theta + \tan^3\theta \csc\theta \) simplifies exactly to \( \sec^3\theta \).
We know \( \sec^2\theta = 1 + \tan^2\theta = 1 + (1 - e^2) = 2 - e^2 \).
Taking the square root gives \( \sec\theta = (2 - e^2)^{\frac{1}{2}} \).
Cubing this value gives \( \sec^3\theta = (2 - e^2)^{\frac{3}{2}} \).
questions.reason_hi:
जैसा कि पिछले प्रश्न में दिखाया गया है, \( \sec\theta + \tan^3\theta \csc\theta \) सरल होकर \( \sec^3\theta \) बन जाता है।
हम जानते हैं कि \( \sec^2\theta = 1 + \tan^2\theta = 1 + (1 - e^2) = 2 - e^2 \) होता है।
वर्गमूल लेने पर \( \sec\theta = (2 - e^2)^{\frac{1}{2}} \) प्राप्त होता है।
इसका घन (cube) करने पर \( \sec^3\theta = (2 - e^2)^{\frac{3}{2}} \) प्राप्त होता है।
